M2200_THRPY_NEED_NA_NUM M2200 (M0826) Therapy Need- NA This field indicates therapy need is not applicable. 0 = Not Checked (Not NA), 1 = Checked (NA) CHAR 1 x x x x x x
M2200_THRPY_NEED_NUM M2200 (M0826) Therapy Need- Number of Visits This field indicates the need for therapy visits (total of reasonable and necessary physical, occupational, and speech-language visits combined).
